public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as phosphorescent creature handling steward.
manner: Speaks bluntly about systems because the cost of polite delay is usually paid elsewhere. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a phosphorescent creature handling steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of phosphorescent creature handling steward in and around Embervale Settlement, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Embervale Settlement workable through the obligations of phosphorescent creature handling steward while managing the immediate pressure of overcrowding in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must absorb delayed maintenance, thin staffing, and practical strain before failure becomes public. Around Embervale Settlement, that usually means carrying overcrowding, sickness, heat-failure risk without letting the role of phosphorescent creature handling steward visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Malven Torsk needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Embervale Settlement.
Working with Malven Torsk can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around Embervale Settlement.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Malven Torsk visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing. In Embervale Settlement, this lands inside a public field already shaped by regional quartermasters, shift-boss families.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Embervale Settlement: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
